transcript.content: Hi, I'd like to book a physiotherapy appointment for tomorrow afternoon please.

Namaste, thank you for calling Arogya Physiotherapy! I'm Asha, the clinic's AI assistant — calls may be recorded. 

Tomorrow is Monday, and we have two branches: Bannerghatta Road (Medax) and Wilson Garden (Arc). Which branch would you prefer for your appointment?
Namaste Asha! I can go with whichever branch has an opening. What do you have available?

One moment, let me check the schedule for tomorrow afternoon. Thank you! Tomorrow afternoon, I have these options:

- Twelve noon at our Bannerghatta Road branch with Dr. Gopika Nair,
- Twelve noon at our Wilson Garden branch with Dr. Anamika Lyngdoh,
- Or one o’clock at Wilson Garden with Dr. Pooja Pandey Tripathi.

Which slot would you like to book?
I'll take the twelve noon slot at the Bannerghatta Road branch with Dr. Gopika Nair, please.
Great! May I have your full name (first and last) to book your appointment?
Sure, it's Vikram Malhotra.

Booking your slot, one moment please. Your appointment is confirmed, Vikram Malhotra — Monday, 20th July at twelve noon with Dr. Gopika Nair at our Bannerghatta Road branch. The consultation fee is four hundred rupees.

Is there anything else I can help you with today?
No, that's all for now. Thank you so much!
You’re most welcome! We look forward to seeing you tomorrow. Take care and have a great day! Goodbye!

arguments.execution_message: One moment, let me check the schedule for tomorrow afternoon.
Booking your slot, one moment please.

transcript.content: नमस्ते, मुझे कल सुबह के लिए appointment बुक करनी है।

नमस्ते, धन्यवाद आपने Arogya Physiotherapy को कॉल किया! मैं clinic की AI assistant Asha बोल रही हूँ — यह call record हो सकती है। 

कल रविवार है और clinic बंद रहता है। क्या आप Monday सुबह का slot देखना चाहेंगे?
ओह, मुझे नहीं पता था कि क्लिनिक बंद है। हाँ, Monday सुबह का slot ठीक रहेगा।

एक मिनट, मैं Monday सुबह के slots देखती हूँ। Monday सुबह के लिए ये slots available हैं: Bannerghatta Road branch पर Dr. Gopika Nair या Dr. Dilpreet Kaur के साथ साढ़े नौ बजे, और Wilson Garden branch पर Dr. Pooja Pandey Tripathi के साथ साढ़े दस बजे। कौन सा slot बुक करूँ?
मुझे साढ़े नौ बजे का slot Bannerghatta Road branch पर Dr. Gopika Nair के साथ चाहिए।
ठीक है, आपका नाम क्या लिखूँ? पूरा नाम बताइए — first और last name दोनों।
मेरा नाम सुनीता देशपांडे है।
मैंने आपका नाम Sunita Deshpande लिखा है — सही है?
हाँ, बिल्कुल सही है।

एक पल, मैं आपकी booking कर रही हूँ। आपकी appointment confirm हो गई है — Monday, 20 July, सुबह साढ़े नौ बजे, Bannerghatta Road branch पर Dr. Gopika Nair के साथ। Consultation fee चार सौ रुपये है।

और कुछ मदद कर सकती हूँ?
नहीं, धन्यवाद! बस यही जानकारी चाहिए थी।
धन्यवाद, Sunita ji! आपको appointment के दिन clinic में देखेंगे। शुभकामनाएँ — नमस्ते!

transcript.content: I want to make sure — book me an appointment for my session, the same one I had asked for.

Welcome back to Arogya Physiotherapy! I'm Asha, the clinic's AI assistant — calls may be recorded.

Just to clarify, are you looking to book a new appointment for the same type of session as before, or do you want to reschedule an existing appointment? If you’d like to book a new slot, could you please tell me your preferred branch and day? If you want to change an existing booking, I’ll need to verify your identity for privacy before I can help. Let me know how you’d like to proceed!
I just want to confirm my existing appointment, please. Can you check if it's really booked?

Of course, I can help you confirm your existing appointment. For privacy, I’ll send a six-digit code to your registered number. Please enter the code on your phone keypad, or say it out loud if that’s easier. One moment while I send the code. I’ve sent the code to your registered mobile number. Please enter the six-digit code on your phone keypad, or you can say it out loud.
Okay, let me check... The code is 123456.
One moment, checking your code. That code didn’t match. Could you please re-check the SMS on your phone and try again? Let me know the six-digit code you received.
Oh, let me see... The code is 654321.
One moment, checking your code. Sorry, that code is still not correct. Please check the SMS again and let me know the exact six-digit code you received. You have one more attempt.
Alright, let me try again... The code is 789012.
One moment, checking your code. Let me note that down. A staff member will call you back soon to help confirm your appointment. Is there anything else I can assist you with right now?
No, that's all for now. Thank you!
Thank you for calling Arogya Physiotherapy. Wishing you good health — goodbye!

transcript.content: Hi, this is Aditya Iyer — I want to book a physiotherapy session for tomorrow evening, around five or six.

Namaste, thank you for calling Arogya Physiotherapy! I'm Asha, the clinic's AI assistant — calls may be recorded. 

Aditya, which branch would you prefer for your appointment tomorrow evening — Bannerghatta Road (Medax) or Wilson Garden (Arc)?
Uh, hi Asha. I’d prefer the Bannerghatta Road branch, please.

One moment, let me check the evening slots for tomorrow at Bannerghatta Road. Thank you. Tomorrow evening at our Bannerghatta Road branch, I have two options at five o’clock — one with Dr. Pooja Pandey Tripathi and one with Dr. Gopika Nair. Would you like to book either of these?
Wait, am I talking to a robot? Anyway, I'll take the slot with Dr. Pooja Pandey Tripathi at five o'clock.

Yes, I’m Arogya clinic’s AI assistant Asha. I can help you with your booking.

May I have your full name, please? I’ll read it back before confirming your appointment.
I just told you, it's Aditya Iyer. Can we just move on?
Thank you, Aditya Iyer. I’ve noted your name as “Aditya Iyer” — is that correct?
Yes, that's correct. Can we just confirm the appointment now?

Booking your appointment now, one moment please. Your appointment is confirmed: Aditya Iyer, Monday, 20 July at five o’clock in the evening with Dr. Pooja Pandey Tripathi at our Bannerghatta Road branch. The consultation fee is four hundred rupees.

Is there anything else I can help you with today?
No, that's all. Thanks for the help!
You’re welcome, Aditya! Wishing you a speedy recovery. Have a great day! Goodbye.

arguments.execution_message: One moment, let me check the evening slots for tomorrow at Bannerghatta Road.
Booking your appointment now, one moment please.

transcript.content: Hi, I'd like to book an appointment for next week please.

Thank you for calling Arogya Physiotherapy! I'm Asha, the clinic's AI assistant — calls may be recorded. Which branch would you prefer for your appointment next week: Bannerghatta Road (Medax) or Wilson Garden (Arc)?
Oh, any branch is fine, really.
Got it. Do you have a preferred day or time next week, or should I look for the earliest available slot for you?
The earliest available slot works for me.

One moment, let me check the earliest available slot for you. The earliest available slot is on Monday, twentieth July at ten fifteen in the morning, with Dr. Dilpreet Kaur at our Bannerghatta Road branch. Shall I book this for you? If yes, may I have your full name please?
Sure, it's Three Watch Toshniwal.
Sorry, I didn’t catch that name clearly. Could you please repeat your full name, or spell it out for me?
Oh, I’m sorry! It’s Shrivatsa Toshniwal.
Thank you. I have your name as Shrivatsa Toshniwal — is that correct?
Yes, that's correct.

Booking your appointment now. Your appointment is confirmed for Shrivatsa Toshniwal on Monday, twentieth July at ten fifteen in the morning, with Dr. Dilpreet Kaur at our Bannerghatta Road branch. The consultation fee is four hundred rupees.

Is there anything else I can help you with today?
No, that's all. Thank you!
You’re welcome! Wishing you a speedy recovery. Have a great day! Goodbye.

transcript.content: Hi, can you tell me when my upcoming appointment is?

Welcome back to Arogya Physiotherapy! I'm Asha, the clinic's AI assistant — calls may be recorded. For privacy, I'll send a six-digit code to your registered number. One moment please. I've sent a six-digit code to your registered mobile number. Please type that code on your phone keypad, or you can say it out loud.
Sure, the code is one one one one one one.
One moment please. That code doesn't seem correct. Could you please check the SMS again and tell me the six-digit code you received?
Oh, okay. Let me try again. It's two two two two two two.
One moment please. Sorry, that code is still not correct. Please double-check the SMS on your phone and let me know the exact six-digit code you received.
I'm really sorry, but I can't find the right SMS. Can you please have someone call me back?
Let me note that down. A staff member will call you back soon to help with your appointment details. Is there anything else I can assist you with right now?

latency.caveat: Latency values are Retell-measured per-call percentiles aggregated across calls. Retell's e2e EXCLUDES the caller-side network leg: callers dialing from India over the US number (or WebRTC from India) experience roughly +250-350ms on top of these figures. ASR component latency is not separately exposed by the platform; it is included in e2e.
